metadata.name: Rift Bolt suspend special action: hand to exile with time counter
metadata.description: Tests the suspend special action (CR 702.62a) for Rift Bolt. p1 pays {R} during precombat main to exile Rift Bolt from hand with 1 time counter. The harness sends Command::SuspendCard, which validates mana, deducts {R} from the pool, moves Rift Bolt to exile (is_suspended=true, 1 time counter), and emits CardSuspended. The upkeep trigger lifecycle (SuspendCounterTrigger fires at beginning of upkeep, removes counter; SuspendCastTrigger fires when last counter removed, casting Rift Bolt for free; Rift Bolt deals 3 damage) is fully covered by unit tests in tests/suspend.rs (9 tests, CR 702.62a-d).
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.62a: Suspend's first ability is a static ability that creates a special action (CR 116.2f): while the card is in a player's hand, that player may pay the suspend cost and exile the card with N time counters on it. This is not a spell, does not use the stack, and can be done any time the player could cast a sorcery. The harness handles this via the 'suspend_card' player action type, which maps to Command::SuspendCard. The engine function handle_suspend_card in rules/suspend.rs validates the mana (casting::can_pay_cost), deducts it (casting::pay_cost), moves the card to exile (ZoneId::Exile), sets is_suspended=true, adds time counters via with_counter(CounterType::Time, N), and emits GameEvent::ManaCostPaid and GameEvent::CardSuspended. The full lifecycle (upkeep trigger, counter removal, free cast, haste, damage) is tested in tests/suspend.rs.

script.step_note: p1's first main phase. Rift Bolt is in p1's hand; p1 has {R} ready in mana pool (pre-loaded to simulate tapping a Mountain). p1 uses the suspend special action (CR 702.62a, CR 116.2f): pay {R}, exile Rift Bolt from hand with 1 time counter.

actions.description: Initial: Rift Bolt in p1's hand; exile empty; p1 has {R} in mana pool
actions.note: Verifies the starting position before the suspend special action.

CR 702.62a: p1 pays {R} (the suspend cost) and exiles Rift Bolt from hand with 1 time counter. This is a special action (CR 116.2f) — it does not use the stack. Command::SuspendCard is sent to the engine. handle_suspend_card validates mana, deducts {R}, moves Rift Bolt to exile with is_suspended=true and 1 time counter, emits CardSuspended.

actions.description: After suspend special action: Rift Bolt in exile (is_suspended=true, 1 time counter); hand empty; mana pool empty
actions.note: CR 702.62b: Rift Bolt is now 'suspended' — it is in the exile zone, has suspend, and has a time counter on it (CR 702.62b). p1's mana pool was depleted by paying {R}. The full upkeep trigger lifecycle (SuspendCounterTrigger at beginning of upkeep, SuspendCastTrigger when last counter removed, free cast with haste, 3 damage to target) is validated by unit tests in crates/engine/tests/suspend.rs (9 tests covering CR 702.62a-d).
